summary: Extended the cycle record helper so one command can also sync started or completed cycle state into status/state.json.
changes: Added explicit --state and --state-mode started|completed options to scripts/cycle_record.py.
Covered started-mode, completed-mode, and CLI validation paths with unit tests.
Documented the new state sync workflow in README.md.
notes: This cycle used the required design and planning workflow before relying on the already-started implementation slice.
